 CDefaultInterfaceThe default interface for the RuntimeContainer
 Cdefault_initializerDefault initializer does nothing
 Cfunny_initializerAn initializer for simple types The initializer makes use of truncation for non-float types, and over- and underflow to produce different values in the member of the individual stages in the container
 Cdefault_printerDefault printer prints nothing
 Cverbose_printer_baseVerbose printer prints level and content
 Crecursive_printerVerbose printer to print levels recursively
 Csingle_printerVerbose printer to print a single level

 Cmember_apply_at
 Crtc_lessCheck the mixin level to be below specified level
 Crtc_equal
 Ccreate_rtcCreate the runtime container type The runtime container type is build from a list of data types, the recursive build can be optionally stopped at the level of argument N
 Ccreate_rtc_typesCreate an mpl vector of mixin types Every stage in the runtime container contains all the previous ones. The resulting mpl vector of this meta function contains all individual stages

 CHasRef< T, std::enable_if_t< std::is_same< decltype(std::declval< T >().ref), typename o2::dataformats::RangeReference< int, int > >::value > >

 CNameHeaderExample data header containing a name of an object as a null terminated char arr. this is a template! at instantiation the template parameter determines the size of the held string array. a caveat with decoding is (if length of string is not known) you have to use header::get<NameHeader<0>>(buffer) to get it out of a buffer. May improve in the future if enough people complain. If the compiler decides to pad the end of struct, the length of padding is stored in the last byte

 CStackMove-only header stack with serialized headers This is the flat buffer where all the headers in a multi-header go. This guy knows how to move the serialized content to FairMQ and inform it how to release when all is sent. methods to construct a multi-header intended use:
